name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 18 Jun 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Greetings to all our Maropostian users out there!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are expanding our abandoned cart feature integration beyond our existing Neto, Shopify, and ClickBank users by making our "},{"text":"REST API","bold":true},{"text":" payload public to other account holders as well."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" Only registered Marketing Cloud users can access the "},{"text":"REST API","bold":true},{"text":" payloads."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In addition, we have also made some layout and UI modifications to our Recurring Custom Email Campaign Reports."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about these features, read ahead!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ABANDONED CART REST API FEATURE:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Registered Marketing Cloud users can use this interface to authenticate and update their store details with us. You can use the "},{"text":"Authenticate and Update","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"REST API","bold":true},{"text":" feature to integrate multiple store accounts and generate unique Auth Keys to grant multiple API requests."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"After your integration setup, you can send your store’s abandoned cart data to us through the "},{"text":"Abandoned Cart","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"Payload API","bold":true},{"text":". In adherence to data privacy laws, only the customer ID, abandoned cart ID, and order details are stored with us."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With the help of the "},{"text":"REST API","bold":true},{"text":" feature, you can create an automated process for sending abandoned cart email messages to your contacts via journeys."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In addition, we have created a separate module for you to check your integrated stores and allow you to make any changes if necessary. You can access this section from "},{"text":"Navigation","bold":true},{"text":" >> "},{"text":"Integrations","bold":true},{"text":" >> "},{"text":"Abandoned Cart REST API","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/abncart8.068J1000001XFqpIAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/abncart8.068J1000001XFqpIAG.png","name":"abncart8","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1642,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This API functionality can also be availed of by Neto, Shopify, and ClickBank users if they only wish to send abandoned cart-related campaigns."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn how to integrate your stores with your Marketing Cloud account via API requests, kindly read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Abandoned-Cart-REST-API-Integration","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Abandoned Cart REST API","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"RECURRING CUSTOM EMAIL REPORT ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With this revamp, the layout of our recurring reports is streamlined with an updated UI design, and the campaign types are combined in a single field. Users from now on can choose the campaign type from the list and select the brands, names, and campaign tags, respectively."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Additionally, you can include all the new campaigns from their report’s inception to their delivery date. This option is exclusive to recurring reports only. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep23.068J1000001XFyyIAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep23.068J1000001XFyyIAG.png","name":"custrep23","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":376,"width":2725}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about generating a one-time or recurring custom report, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Custom-Email-Campaign-Report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Custom Email Campaign Report","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]}]
